proposal: The main bridge is held together by optimism and duct tape. Repairs will cost real money.

options.label: Fund repairs
options.result_text: The bridge creaks less. Auntie Olga says it is still suspicious.

options.label: Delay again
options.result_text: Citizens take the long route. Optimism declines.

proposal: Form inventory day. Count stamps, miscount stamps, recount stamps. Procedure continues.

options.label: Count carefully
options.result_text: Stamps are counted. One is missing. It was always missing.

options.label: Estimate and move on
options.result_text: Estimate filed. Accuracy deferred to next inventory.

authoring.writer_notes: Temporary low-weight repeatable after Pack C removed one-time fillers; not Pack C approved. Rewrite in 2B-6+.
